lesson_title: Leadership, Policy and Complex Interaction: Writing Lesson 6
learning_objective: Learners can synthesise, justify, negotiate and adapt register in a writing task about critical thinking.
cefr_outcome: Learners can express ideas fluently and spontaneously and use language flexibly for social, academic and professional purposes.
learner_facing_explanation: In this lesson you will practise writing for leadership, policy and complex interaction. You will learn useful language connected to critical thinking and practise advanced modality. By the end, you should be able to complete a short real-life task and explain your answer clearly at C1 level.
complete_teaching_input: Focus language: advanced modality. Vocabulary theme: critical thinking. The teacher introduces the target language in a meaningful context, models pronunciation and form, checks meaning with concept questions, and moves learners from controlled practice to freer use. At C1, learners should synthesise, justify, negotiate and adapt register with increasing independence. The lesson should use board examples, short teacher modelling, pair practice, feedback and a final communicative task.
examples: Example 1: I can use advanced modality to talk about critical thinking.
Example 2: The learner gives a C1 answer with clear meaning and correct key language.
Example 3: The learner checks, improves and repeats the answer after feedback.
Example 4: The learner uses one linking phrase or support phrase suitable for C1.

interactive_practice.prompt: Choose the best sentence using advanced modality.
options: Correct use of advanced modality in a C1 sentence.
Incorrect word order with advanced modality.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Correct. The sentence uses advanced modality accurately.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check the form and meaning of advanced modality.

interactive_practice.prompt: Match the critical thinking phrase to its meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Good matching. You understand the phrase meaning.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Look again at the context and key words.

interactive_practice.prompt: Build a complete answer for the lesson task.
interactive_practice.model_answer: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand critical thinking.
interactive_practice.feedback_correct: Well done. Your sentence is complete and meaningful.
interactive_practice.feedback_incorrect: Check that your sentence has a subject, verb and clear meaning.

correct_answers.P3: I can explain my idea clearly because I understand critical thinking.

instant_feedback.correct: Correct. Continue to the next step.
instant_feedback.partly_correct: Good start. Check accuracy and add one more detail.
instant_feedback.incorrect: Try again. Review the model and look at the key language.

teacher_notes: Begin with a quick diagnostic question. Model the target form advanced modality. Use choral repetition if pronunciation is important. Monitor pair work and record three common errors. Finish with delayed correction and one confidence-building success point.
homework_task: Write or record five sentences about critical thinking using language from this lesson.

assessment_task.task_title: C1 Writing Check - Leadership, Policy and Complex Interaction
assessment_task.instructions: Complete a short writing task using advanced modality and vocabulary from critical thinking.
success_criteria: Uses advanced modality with reasonable accuracy
Uses vocabulary connected to critical thinking
Responds at the expected CEFR level

criteria.name: Language control
criteria.descriptor: Uses advanced modality and sentence structure accurately.

criteria.name: Vocabulary range
criteria.descriptor: Uses appropriate words connected to critical thinking.

criteria.name: Fluency/coherence
criteria.descriptor: Organises ideas clearly for the level.

speaking_task: Speak for 60-120 seconds about critical thinking. Use at least two examples and one reason.
writing_task: Write a short C1 response about critical thinking. Include the target language: advanced modality.

listening_audio.script: Audio script for C1-M05-L06. Speaker one: Today we are practising critical thinking. Speaker two: I need to use advanced modality correctly. Speaker one: Listen carefully and choose the answer that best matches the meaning.

visual_activity_cards.title: Advanced Modality form
visual_activity_cards.alt_text: Visual grammar card for advanced modality
